tool.name: list_workflow_templates
tool.description: List available workflow templates (YAML DAGs with dependency chains). Combines built-in templates with user-contributed /workspace/workflows/*.yaml.

tool.name: load_workflow_template
tool.description:
Load a workflow template by name. Returns the full step DAG plus execution_order (list of parallel-executable batches in topological order).
Use execution_order to drive multi-agent orchestration: each batch can run concurrently, next batch waits for previous to complete.
